summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected; each open PR was classified independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix are blocked, and low-signal closeout is disabled. One security-shaped PR is routed to central security handling.
